_comment: Three proposed goals with distinct ids — ISSA-2 distinctness invariant satisfied. Each goal carries an independent conformance_impact_pct estimate.

proposed_series_goals.description: Migrate vendored client SDK to the v8.7.0 conformance-replay surface.
Expand cross-runner conformance corpus to all five v8.7.0 schemas.
Adopt the inter-series-scoping artifact in the cycle-007 ship runbook.
